introSection: Odin's Little Dragon Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer DAL Amusement Rides currently located at Adventure Coast Southport in Southport, Merseyside, England, UK.
fullText: Odin's Little Dragon Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer DAL Amusement Rides currently located at Adventure Coast Southport in Southport, Merseyside, England, UK.
